description: Tech stack implementation guide - LOCAL OVERRIDE for testing boilerplate integration
warning: This is a LOCAL-ONLY override file. Not part of official governance.

nocode.description: No custom code - configuration and content only
nocode.build_instructions: Provide configuration files, content templates, and setup documentation. No code files.

lowcode.description: Business logic only - extends existing boilerplate
lowcode.build_instructions: Build ONLY business-specific modules that extend the boilerplate auto-loader architecture. Do NOT rebuild infrastructure.

output_structure.business/frontend/pages/: Business frontend pages auto-loaded by boilerplate (e.g., ClientDashboard.jsx)
output_structure.business/backend/routes/: Business API routes auto-mounted by boilerplate (e.g., assessments.py)

custom.description: Full custom implementation - build complete application
custom.build_instructions: Build complete application from scratch including all infrastructure.

platform_hosting.deployment_steps: Provide platform configuration and content files

vercel_with_supabase.description: Vercel for frontend/API, Supabase for database

lowcode_integration_pattern.step_1: Claude builds business logic in business/ directory
lowcode_integration_pattern.step_2: Harness copies teebu-saas-platform boilerplate to output
lowcode_integration_pattern.step_3: Final ZIP contains startup root with saas-boilerplate/ and overlaid business/ artifacts
lowcode_integration_pattern.step_4: User configures env files and deploys backend/frontend

prompt_injection_template.for_lowcode_stack:
**TECH STACK: LOWCODE - BOILERPLATE AUTO-LOADER MODE**

You are building BUSINESS LOGIC ONLY for {startup_name}.

The teebu-saas-boilerplate already provides:
- Authentication (signup, login, sessions)
- Payment processing (Stripe, subscriptions)
- Database (PostgreSQL via Supabase)
- Email system (transactional emails)
- UI framework (React, Tailwind)
- API infrastructure (Express/FastAPI middleware and core app)
- Deployment config (Railway/Vercel)

Your job: Build ONLY business-specific code under `business/**`:
- Frontend pages in `business/frontend/pages/*.jsx`
- Backend routes in `business/backend/routes/*.py`
- Domain models in `business/models/`
- Business services in `business/services/`
- Business config in `business/config/`
- Integration notes in `business/README-INTEGRATION.md`

**AUTO-LOADER RULES (NON-NEGOTIABLE):**
- Frontend pages auto-route to `/dashboard/<kebab-case>` by filename.
- Backend route files auto-mount at `/api/<filename>`.
- Do NOT edit `frontend/src/App.js` to register routes.
- Do NOT edit backend `main.py` to register routers.

**DO NOT BUILD:**
- Auth system (boilerplate has it)
- Payment system (boilerplate has it)
- Database/platform setup (boilerplate has it)
- Boilerplate route registration code
- Deployment scripts (boilerplate has it)

**OUTPUT STRUCTURE:**
business/
  frontend/pages/   <- Auto-loaded dashboard pages
  backend/routes/   <- Auto-mounted API routes
  models/           <- Domain entities
  services/         <- Business logic
  config/           <- Business configuration
  tests/            <- Business tests
  README-INTEGRATION.md <- Integration guide
